channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: High Court rules TLS member’s case premature and declines to stop AGM agenda discussion
item.description: The High Court of Tanzania, sitting in the Arusha Zone, has dismissed a judicial review application filed by Tanganyika Law Society (TLS) member, Mr Bartazary Mahai. The applicant had sought to block ...

item.title: Winston Marshall’s Shift from Musician to Conservative Commentator on YouTube
item.description: Winston Marshall, formerly the banjo player for Mumford & Sons, has undergone a striking career transformation from celebrated musician to conservative YouTuber. The son of Paul Marshall, owner of GB ...

item.title: K Kavitha Suggests US Senate Model for Rajya Sabha Amid Delimitation Discussion
item.description: Telangana leader K Kavitha has put forward a proposal to restructure the Rajya Sabha elections by introducing a model similar to that of the United States Senate. Her suggestion comes in the context o...

item.title: Firearms Charges After Search Warrant Executed at Tillsonburg Home
item.description: Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) have laid firearms charges following the execution of a search warrant at a residence in Tillsonburg. The police operation, which took place recently, involved a thorou...

item.title: Pressure mounts on Tanzania to adopt ILO Convention protecting domestic workers
item.description: As Tanzania marks International Workers’ Day, stakeholders in the labour sector, led by the Conservation, Hotel, Domestic and Allied Workers Union (Chodawu), are urging the government to speed up the ...

item.title: Security Breach at Washington Hilton Raises Concerns Over Hotel Safety Measures
item.description: In Washington, a suspect named Cole Allen, aged 31, breached security at the Washington Hilton during the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner attended by former US President Donald Trump. A...

item.title: Germany emphasises collaboration with U.S. following planned troop reduction
item.description: Following the recent announcement by the United States to reduce its military presence in Germany, Berlin is signalling a shift towards emphasising shared strategic interests rather than focusing on u...

item.title: Six Australian Activists Released After Gaza Flotilla Interception
item.description: Six Australian activists who were detained by the Israeli military while attempting to deliver aid to Gaza have been released after being intercepted in international waters off the coast of Greece. T...

item.title: Market Performance Overview for May 1, 2026
item.description: On May 1, 2026, the stock market saw a mixed performance as investors navigated a range of corporate and geopolitical news. The Nasdaq composite climbed 0.9%, and the S&P 500 managed a 0.3% gain, both...

item.title: Pakistan Navy Inducts First Hangor-Class Submarine, Strengthening Defence Ties with China
item.description: The Pakistan Navy has officially commissioned its first Hangor-class submarine, named PNS/M Hangor, in a ceremony held at Sanya, China. The event was attended by President Asif Ali Zardari as the chie...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Instructs Authorities to Develop Strategy to Stabilise Power Tariffs and Improve Energy Sector
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, while chairing a meeting on Saturday regarding reforms in the energy sector, has directed the concerned authorities to devise a detailed plan to stabilise electricity ta...

item.title: Joy of Jazz 2026 Line-up Highlights International Stars and South African Jazz Heritage
item.description: The 27th edition of the Standard Bank Joy of Jazz will take place at the Sandton Convention Centre from 25 to 26 September 2026. The festival continues to bridge generations and geographies, celebrati...

item.title: Keir Starmer highlights economic risks from Iran conflict and calls for closer EU ties
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer has cautioned that the UK faces a potential spike in inflation as a result of the ongoing conflict involving Iran, describing it as a 'war on two fronts' that is impacting global oil ...

item.title: Effective Study Techniques to Actually Remember What You Learn
item.description: Many students in Pakistan face the frustrating problem of studying hard yet failing to recall information during exams. The issue often lies not in the effort but in ineffective study methods. Popular...

item.title: Hyderabad Kingsmen Defeat Islamabad United in Close PSL Eliminator to Reach Final
item.description: LAHORE: In a thrilling PSL Eliminator-2 at Gaddafi Stadium, Hyderabad Kingsmen pulled off a remarkable victory over Islamabad United by just two runs to reach the final. The debutants, who had lost fo...

item.title: Pakistan Reduces Passport Processing Time and Moves to Cashless System
item.description: The federal government of Pakistan has announced significant reforms to improve the passport issuance process for citizens. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi, along with Minister of State Talal Chaudhry,...

item.title: Deadly drone strike in Kherson highlights ongoing frontline tensions as Russia reports gains
item.description: A drone strike in Ukraine’s southern Kherson region killed two civilians and injured several others after hitting a minibus, according to Ukrainian officials. The attack underscores the continued dang...

item.title: Catherine Jepchumba, Daughter of NSE Chairman, Marries Nigerian Partner in Traditional Ceremony
item.description: Kiprono Kittony's daughter, Catherine Jepchumba, has officially tied the knot with her long-term Nigerian boyfriend, Tobi Durotoye, in a lavish traditional wedding that showcased a beautiful fusion of...

item.title: China-made drones of PH mission blocked due to registration rules in West Philippine Sea

item.title: Donny Pangilinan and Belle Mariano temporarily pause their love team project, share emotional messages
item.description: Filipino actors Donny Pangilinan and Belle Mariano have announced that they are putting their popular love team on hold, prompting heartfelt messages from both stars. Known collectively as 'DonBelle',...
